title: Nootov!chopper
description: A simple mod for a fast way to chop down trees with an axe.
body:
Nootov!chopper

This is a simple Treecapitator-like mod that allows you to instantly chop down trees with an axe. Deals damage to your axe proportional to amount of broken blocks, considering enchantments. Automatically stops breaking blocks when your axe is about to break. Minecraft version: **1.20**.x.

Installation:

**1**. Install Forge **47**.x or higher (may work with older versions but not guaranteed). **2**. Download the **.jar** file from the Versions tab according to your Minecraft version. **3**. Place it into the `C:\Users\{YOUR_USERNAME}\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\mods` folder. **4**. Enjoy!

Warning:

This is a server-sided mod.

If you are playing in singleplayer, you have nothing to worry about. Otherwise, if you are playing in multiplayer, this mod works only if **BOTH** you and the server host have it installed.
